creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Maintainer update of mail/mutt-devel and mail/mutt-devel-lite:

	- Added OPTIONS support.
	- Added support for Berkeley DB 5.1 (used by header caches)

Committer: This is a PR for two ports: mutt-devel (master port) and
           mutt-devel-lite (slave port).

	   New file (cvs add): mail/mutt-devel/options
